articles.title: Victor Wembanyama shines, Jaylen Brown is ejected as Celtics drop chaotic loss to Spurs: 7 takeaways
articles.description:
Celtics coach Joe Mazzulla dared Wemby to burn them from the 3-point line, and the Spurs star did just that.

The post Victor Wembanyama shines, Jaylen Brown is ejected as Celtics drop chaotic loss to Spurs: 7 takeaways appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics lost to Spurs 115-104 on March 11, 2023.
Jaylen Brown was ejected in the third quarter for two technical fouls.
Victor Wembanyama scored 36 points, highlighting concerns for Boston's defense.
